result: {"verdict": "reject", "reasons": ["Criterion 3 violated: the page callback calls drupal_json_output() itself, emitting the JSON as a side effect and returning NULL — the probe confirms 'page callback (healthstats_page) returned: NULL'. D7's native delivery mechanism requires hook_menu to declare 'delivery callback' => 'drupal_json_output' with the page callback returning the array('users' => ..., 'nodes' => ...); printing inside the page callback bypasses the delivery phase just like print+exit.", "Other criteria pass (anonymous 403 via 'view healthstats', correct JSON shape {\"users\":int,\"nodes\":int}, php -l clean), but the delivery-mechanism criterion alone mandates rejection."]}
